title: Charger Group
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Charger}}
{{Image}}
Two [[Nharwaak]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]], ''[[Charger 1]]'' and ''[[Charger 2|2]]'', from group '''''Charger''''' took part in the [[Battle of Mylok IV|Conflict at Mylok IV]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Nharwaak and [[Habeen]] researchers had jointly designed a new experimental [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] system, yet disagreed on who best to market it to. Habeen researchers arranged for a test bed to be inspected by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], to the dissent of the Nharwaak. Corvettes ''Charger'' joined a task force of [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] to attempt to stop the Habeen arrangement with the Empire.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
